'''鈭歞-zh-m-th''' ('''kadazhmethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:well|well]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-zh-m-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:well|well]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-zh-m-th
|-
! Lemma
| kadazhmethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidazhmethoko|thidazhmethoko]] || [[word:jidazhmethoko|jidazhmethoko]] || [[word:shidazhmethoko|shidazhmethoko]] || [[word:kidazhmethoko|kidazhmethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudazhmethoko|thuthudazhmethoko]] || [[word:jujudazhmethoko|jujudazhmethoko]] || [[word:shushudazhmethoko|shushudazhmethoko]] || [[word:kukudazhmethoko|kukudazhmethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodazhmethoko|thodazhmethoko]] || [[word:jodazhmethoko|jodazhmethoko]] || [[word:shodazhmethoko|shodazhmethoko]] || [[word:kodazhmethoko|kodazhmethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dazhmethoko|th忙dazhmethoko]] || [[word:j忙dazhmethoko|j忙dazhmethoko]] || [[word:sh忙dazhmethoko|sh忙dazhmethoko]] || [[word:k忙dazhmethoko|k忙dazhmethoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadazhmethoko|thadazhmethoko]] || [[word:jadazhmethoko|jadazhmethoko]] || [[word:shadazhmethoko|shadazhmethoko]] || [[word:kadazhmethoko|kadazhmethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadazhmethoko|thadazhmethoko]] || [[word:jadazhmethoko|jadazhmethoko]] || [[word:shadazhmethoko|shadazhmethoko]] || [[word:kadazhmethoko|kadazhmethoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
